title: Segfault on unknown SQL function
key_bug_features: Segfault when executing unknown SQL function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES (NULL, NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table);
SELECT unknown_function(name) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
